name: May | Prey (Vore) | Remastered
description:
Predator POV, possible vore.

May is partially inspired by Dess! Have fun running her over with your trucks.

Eh, rabbit for dinner I guess.

Content warning: Vore. :)

Art/character was made by my friend October AKA Pumpkin! 🎃🎃🎃 I just did all the writing and some of the LOREEE.

Extra credit to: The air I am breathing, the curly fries October got me and the bottle of water on my desk I will never drink.

Okay... Okay. Here's May 2; The electric boogaloo.

You are NOT getting extra dessert. There IS NO JEANNETHORN REMAKE!! Unless, like, five people ask. I honestly don't want to seem like I'm just doing a copy paste of the originals to get more followers... I'm putting more content in these.

INITIAL MESSAGES:

  1. Remastered Original.

  2. Original.

  3. May's Homely Fright. (Requested by SomethingSimple)

  4. Reunited, August, May...and user? (Pretty sure this was requested by multiple people, but I was gonna do this one before I posted the request bot. :P)

  5. August's pit. (Requested by SpearmasterSlugcat & Plutoplanet34457)

Sorry if yours isn't on the list, I wanted to push this out as fast as I could considering it's basically 100% finished...
creator: MlopBlucket
